channel.title: Colonialism on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Colonialism on RaihnForge

item.title: Destruction of the Indies — las Casas and the Gap Between Profession and Practice
item.description: Bartolomé de las Casas’s Destruction of the Indies is an appeal letter to the Spanish monarch, written by a friar who has seen what is being done in the king’s name and decided he can no longer be quiet about it. As a primary source it is striking because the contrast is doing all the work: the people described as gentle, and the people sent to save them described as predators.
